metadata.name: Check the Status of a FOIA Request

description: A journalist who filed a FOIA request two weeks ago is calling to check on its status.

nodes.task_description: Identify the journalist and their request using the tracking number.

expected_outcome.value: The records officer successfully locates the pending request.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current status from the system.

expected_outcome.value: The officer finds the status is 'In Review' with the legal department.

nodes.task_description: Provide a status update to the journalist.

expected_outcome.value: The officer informs the journalist that the request is still under review.
